items.headline: GigaCloud Technology (Nasdaq: GCT) reported Q1 2026 results: total revenue $359.5M (+32.2% YoY), gross profit $85.8M (+34.7% YoY), and diluted EPS $1.04 (+52.9% YoY)
GigaCloud Technology (NASDAQ: GCT) Founder and CEO Larry Wu to present at the 21st Annual Needham Technology, Media, & Consumer Conference on May 14, 2026
